name: Park View City
description: Park View City Islamabad is a modern, CDA-approved housing society located in Zone IV of Islamabad, developed by Vision Group. It is designed to provide a peaceful and luxurious lifestyle by combining modern infrastructure with natural beauty, as it is surrounded by the scenic Margalla Hills. The society offers a well-planned environment with residential and commercial areas, wide roads, underground utilities, and 24/7 security. It includes facilities such as parks, a botanical garden, schools, hospitals, mosques, shopping areas, and recreational spaces like a lake and dancing fountain. Park View City aims to create a self-sustained, eco-friendly community where residents can enjoy comfort, convenience, and a high standard of living within a secure and well-organized environment.
head_office_address: First Floor, Razia Sharif Plaza, 90 West, Blue Area, Islamabad, Pakistan
